patterns.module_declaration: Modules declared as `mod foo;` in main.rs, one file per concern
patterns.error_handling: anyhow::Result for fallible ops, `let _ =` for best-effort, `.context()` for error context
patterns.color_system: colors.rs provides state_ansi(state) -> ANSI 256-color escape, state_ansi_bg(state) for backgrounds, RESET/DIM/BOLD constants
patterns.terminal_width: util::term_width() via ioctl TIOCGWINSZ, fallback COLUMNS env then 100
patterns.card_data: Meta struct (bop_core::Meta) with id, glyph, token, title, stage, priority, progress, runs[], subtasks[], failure_reason, exit_code
patterns.card_rendering: list.rs reads Meta per card, renders via raw ANSI escape codes — glyph, token, id, stage, priority, 8-cell progress bar
patterns.serde_patterns: #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = ...)] on optional fields, #[serde(flatten)] for embedding Meta
patterns.test_pattern: tempfile::tempdir() for isolation, setup_card_in_state() helpers, tests in #[cfg(test)] mod tests blocks

existing_implementations.terminal_width_detection: util.rs term_width() uses raw ioctl TIOCGWINSZ — spec says use terminal_size crate instead for cleaner API
existing_implementations.card_list_display: list.rs print_state_group() renders flat text rows with ANSI 256-color state headers, glyph, token, id (truncated 32), stage, priority, 8-cell progress bar
existing_implementations.card_watch: list.rs list_cards_watch() uses notify-debouncer-mini + cursor-up ANSI for in-place redraw
existing_implementations.card_stats: list.rs calculate_stats() computes total, by_state counts, avg_duration, success_rate
existing_implementations.gantt_rendering: gantt.rs renders ANSI timeline bars with state_ansi_bg() fills + HTML mode
existing_implementations.state_colors: colors.rs state_ansi() maps pending=steel-blue, running=amber, done=green, failed=red, merged=violet
existing_implementations.dashboard_script: scripts/dashboard.nu provides a separate Nushell box-drawing dashboard with team rows, 3s refresh
existing_implementations.vibekanban_provider: vibekanban/_bop_provider_impl.py reads Meta per card, emits id/title/status/team/stage/meta_path — missing priority/provider/elapsed/progress/ac_spec_id

key_types.Meta: bop_core::Meta — primary card data model with 40+ fields
key_types.RunRecord: bop_core::RunRecord — provider, started_at, ended_at, duration_s, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, cost_usd, outcome
key_types.Label: bop_core::Label — name + kind
key_types.CardStats: list.rs CardStats — total, by_state, avg_duration_s, success_rate_pct

note: This spec adds a progressive degradation ANSI renderer, NOT a full TUI. No ratatui/crossterm needed. All output is string-based ANSI escape sequences written to stdout. The future spec 029 (bop ui) will add the full ratatui TUI.
